title: Job Finding Assistance * Immigrants - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Job Finding Assistance * Immigrants 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Immigrants Migrants Seasonal Workers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SE WORKS AND WORKSOURCE PORTLAND METRO-SE SE WORKS FOSTER PROFESSIONAL IMMIGRANT CREDENTIAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps immigrants and refugees find long-term jobs based on the degrees or certificates they earned in their home countries. Provides a career coach to help with credential recognition, creating an employment plan, understanding American workplace culture, and ongoing job placement support. Also offers education and skills training through on-the-job training, paid internships, and workshops. 6401 SE Foster Road Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Immigrants with degrees or certifications from a country that is not the United States of America Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (503) 772-2330 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SE WORKS AND WORKSOURCE PORTLAND METRO-SE SE WORKS HAROLD PROFESSIONAL IMMIGRANT CREDENTIAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps immigrants and refugees find long-term jobs based on the degrees or certificates they earned in their home countries. Provides a career coach to help with credential recognition, creating an employment plan, understanding American workplace culture, and ongoing job placement support. Also offers education and skills training through on-the-job training, paid internships, and workshops. 8044 SE Harold Street Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Immigrants with degrees or certifications from a country that is not the United States of America Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (503) 772-2330 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SE WORKS AND WORKSOURCE PORTLAND METRO-SE PROFESSIONAL IMMIGRANT CREDENTIAL PROGRAM SE WORKS AND WORKSOURCE PORTLAND METRO-SE PROFESSIONAL IMMIGRANT CREDENTIAL PROGRAM
